hero.headline: Sound That
hero.subheadline: We design, install, and operate world-class audio experiences for concerts, weddings, and corporate events across Rwanda and beyond.

service_cards.title: Concerts & Festivals
service_cards.body: Line arrays, subwoofer stacks, monitor systems, and full stage management for live music at any scale.

service_cards.title: Weddings & Celebrations
service_cards.body: Crystal-clear ceremony audio, elegant background music, and powerful dance-floor systems for your perfect day.

service_cards.title: Corporate Events
service_cards.body: Conference PA systems, lavalier microphones, presentation audio, and broadcast-grade reliability.

hero.label: Our Services
hero.title: Audio Solutions for Every Occasion
hero.body: BrightTone offers end-to-end sound design, equipment rental, and live operation for events of all sizes.

items.title: Concerts & Festivals
items.body: We deploy professional line-array systems, high-output subwoofers, stage monitors, and front-of-house mixing desks.

items.title: Weddings & Celebrations
items.body: Elegant, unobtrusive systems that sound spectacular without dominating your décor.

items.title: Corporate Events
items.body: Broadcast-grade reliability with lavalier mics, panel systems, and live-stream integration.

items.title: Kigali Jazz Festival
items.desc: Full outdoor line-array deployment for 3,000 attendees.

items.title: Amira & David Wedding
items.desc: Elegant ceremony with ambient sound zones.

items.title: Nyamata Music Night
items.desc: Intimate open-air concert featuring local artists.

items.title: EcoBank Annual Gala
items.desc: Award ceremony with wireless mic system.

items.title: Sophie & Eric Wedding
items.desc: Church ceremony to hotel ballroom — seamless audio transition.

story: BrightTone Event was born from a simple belief: every event deserves sound that moves people. Founded by audio engineers with years of experience in live events and studio production.
Today, BrightTone is trusted by festival organizers, wedding planners, and corporate event managers across Rwanda and East Africa.
We don't just rent equipment — we partner with you from planning to performance.

values.title: Precision
values.body: Every decibel matters. We tune systems meticulously for each venue's unique acoustics.

values.title: Reliability
values.body: Backup systems, redundant signal paths, and 24/7 support mean your event never stops.

values.title: Passion
values.body: We love live sound. That energy shows in everything we deliver.

values.title: Innovation
values.body: We continuously invest in cutting-edge equipment and stay ahead of industry trends.

team.name: Eric Munyana
team.bio: 10+ years in live sound and studio engineering. Has mixed for international artists across Africa.

team.name: Grace Ingabire
team.bio: Coordinates logistics and client relations, ensuring every event runs like clockwork.

team.name: Patrick Nziza
team.bio: Specialist in rigging, cabling, and signal routing. Passionate about clean installs.

contact.success_message: Thank you! We'll be in touch within 24 hours.
